title: Senior Financial Analyst - ET Money - Work From Home Available

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - ET Money - Work From Home Available
jsonLd.description:
We at ET Money are looking for an experienced Senior Financial Analyst based out of Madurai. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About ET Money:
ET Money is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in GST

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Flexible working hours
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ET Money!
